reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.10: in-memory bitmap cache makes main-canvas brush strokes much faster. The canting layer bitmap is now kept as a live PIL image shared between the paint session and the renderer, so a stroke no longer decodes the base PNG and the renderer no longer re-decodes it for display. Per-stroke work on a 2048 canvas drops from about 84 ms to 48 ms on the session side, and the render side skips its decode entirely. Verified pixel-identical to the previous bytes path.
